message:
fix(vacuum): emit PRIMARY KEY before UNIQUE and skip explicit indexes in CREATE TABLE SQL (#239)

Two bugs in build_create_table_sql caused VACUUM to produce databases
with corrupted autoindex mappings:

1. Table-level UNIQUE constraints were emitted before PRIMARY KEY
   constraints. Stock SQLite assigns autoindex ordinals in declaration
   order, so sqlite_autoindex_T_1 was mapped to the UNIQUE column
   instead of the PRIMARY KEY column. Swapped the emit order.

2. Explicitly-named UNIQUE indexes (e.g. idx_issues_external_ref_unique)
   were emitted as table-level UNIQUE constraints AND as separate
   CREATE INDEX entries. Stock SQLite would create a phantom
   sqlite_autoindex_T_2 for the duplicate UNIQUE constraint, which had
   no populated B-tree. Added a check to skip non-autoindex names.

These caused PRAGMA integrity_check to report:
  "wrong # of entries in index sqlite_autoindex_issues_2"
  "index sqlite_autoindex_issues_1 entry for rowid N does not match
   the table row payload"

The database was fine before VACUUM — the corruption was introduced
by the VACUUM persist step writing a CREATE TABLE SQL with wrong
constraint ordering.

Added two regression tests that reproduce the exact beads_rust#239
scenario: full schema with TEXT PRIMARY KEY + explicit UNIQUE INDEX
+ CHECK constraints, verified against stock rusqlite after VACUUM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61275,6 +61275,231 @@ mod tests {
         );
     }
 
+    /// Reproduction for issue beads_rust#239: the full beads_rust schema
+    /// with DELETE+INSERT import triggers autoindex corruption that stock
+    /// SQLite's `PRAGMA integrity_check` catches.
+    #[cfg(unix)]
+    #[test]
+    fn test_autoindex_integrity_after_delete_insert_import() {
+        let _serial = super::fsqlite_core_test_serializer();
+        let cx = Cx::new();
+        let dir = tempfile::tempdir().unwrap();
+        let db_path = dir.path().join("autoindex_import_repro.db");
+        let db_str = db_path.to_string_lossy().into_owned();
+
+        let pager = Arc::new(
+            SimplePager::open_with_cx(&cx, UnixVfs::new(), &db_path, PageSize::DEFAULT)
+                .expect("open unix pager"),
+        );
+        let conn = Connection::open_with_env_and_pager(
+            db_str.clone(),
+            ConnectionEnv::default(),
+            PagerBackend::Unix(pager),
+        )
+        .expect("open forced-unix connection");
+
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA synchronous = NORMAL;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA wal_autocheckpoint = 0;").unwrap();
+
+        // Full beads_rust schema (matches schema.rs)
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE issues (
+                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+                content_hash TEXT,
+                title TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(length(title) <= 500),
+                description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+                design TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+                acceptance_criteria TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+                notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+                status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
+                priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 2 CHECK(priority >= 0 AND priority <= 4),
+                issue_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'task',
+                assignee TEXT,
+                owner TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                estimated_minutes INTEGER,
+                created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                created_by TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                closed_at DATETIME,
+                close_reason TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                closed_by_session TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                due_at DATETIME,
+                defer_until DATETIME,
+                external_ref TEXT,
+                source_system TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                source_repo TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '.',
+                deleted_at DATETIME,
+                deleted_by TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                delete_reason TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                original_type TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                compaction_level INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
+                compacted_at DATETIME,
+                compacted_at_commit TEXT,
+                original_size INTEGER,
+                sender TEXT DEFAULT '',
+                ephemeral INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+                pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+                is_template INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_issues_status ON issues(status);").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_issues_priority ON issues(priority);").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_issues_content_hash ON issues(content_hash);").unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_issues_external_ref_unique
+             ON issues(external_ref) WHERE external_ref IS NOT NULL;",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE INDEX idx_issues_ready
+             ON issues(status, priority, created_at)
+             WHERE status = 'open' AND ephemeral = 0 AND pinned = 0 AND is_template = 0;",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE config(key TEXT NOT NULL, value TEXT NOT NULL);",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_config_key ON config(key);").unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE metadata(key TEXT NOT NULL, value TEXT NOT NULL);",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_metadata_key ON metadata(key);").unwrap();
+
+        // Set config (as rebuild_database_family does)
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM config WHERE key = 'issue_prefix';").unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO config(key, value) VALUES ('issue_prefix', 'bd');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+
+        // Simulate the import path: FK off, BEGIN, DELETE+INSERT, COMMIT
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys = OFF;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("BEGIN IMMEDIATE;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM issues WHERE id = 'bd-test';")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO issues(
+                id, content_hash, title, description, design, acceptance_criteria,
+                notes, status, priority, issue_type, assignee, owner,
+                estimated_minutes, created_at, created_by, updated_at,
+                closed_at, close_reason, closed_by_session, due_at, defer_until,
+                external_ref, source_system, source_repo, deleted_at, deleted_by,
+                delete_reason, original_type, compaction_level, compacted_at,
+                compacted_at_commit, original_size, sender, ephemeral, pinned,
+                is_template
+            ) VALUES (
+                'bd-test', NULL, 'x', '', '', '',
+                '', 'open', 2, 'task', NULL, '',
+                NULL, '2026-04-14T00:00:00Z', 'ubuntu', '2026-04-14T00:00:00Z',
+                NULL, '', '', NULL, NULL,
+                NULL, '', '.', NULL, '',
+                '', '', 0, NULL,
+                NULL, NULL, '', 0, 0,
+                0
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("COMMIT;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;").unwrap();
+
+        // (Debug output removed — tests verified.)
+
+        // Run VACUUM (as beads_rust rebuild_database_family does)
+        let _ = conn.execute("VACUUM");
+
+
+
+        conn.close().unwrap();
+
+        // Verify with stock rusqlite
+        let sqlite = rusqlite::Connection::open(&db_path).unwrap();
+        let integrity_check: String = sqlite
+            .query_row("PRAGMA integrity_check;", [], |row| row.get(0))
+            .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(
+            integrity_check, "ok",
+            "autoindex must remain valid after full-schema DELETE+INSERT import + VACUUM"
+        );
+
+        // Verify exact-ID query works
+        let count: i64 = sqlite
+            .query_row(
+                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE id = 'bd-test'",
+                [],
+                |row| row.get(0),
+            )
+            .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(count, 1, "exact-ID query must work via stock SQLite");
+    }
+
+    /// Verify REINDEX with full schema produces SQLite-compatible autoindexes.
+    #[cfg(unix)]
+    #[test]
+    fn test_autoindex_integrity_after_reindex() {
+        let _serial = super::fsqlite_core_test_serializer();
+        let cx = Cx::new();
+        let dir = tempfile::tempdir().unwrap();
+        let db_path = dir.path().join("autoindex_reindex_repro.db");
+        let db_str = db_path.to_string_lossy().into_owned();
+
+        let pager = Arc::new(
+            SimplePager::open_with_cx(&cx, UnixVfs::new(), &db_path, PageSize::DEFAULT)
+                .expect("open unix pager"),
+        );
+        let conn = Connection::open_with_env_and_pager(
+            db_str.clone(),
+            ConnectionEnv::default(),
+            PagerBackend::Unix(pager),
+        )
+        .expect("open forced-unix connection");
+
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE issues (
+                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+                content_hash TEXT,
+                title TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(length(title) <= 500),
+                description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+                status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
+                priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 2 CHECK(priority >= 0 AND priority <= 4),
+                issue_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'task',
+                created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
+                source_repo TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '.',
+                ephemeral INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+                pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+                is_template INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_issues_status ON issues(status);").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_issues_content_hash ON issues(content_hash);").unwrap();
+
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO issues(id, title, status, priority, issue_type, created_at, updated_at)
+             VALUES ('bd-test', 'x', 'open', 2, 'task', '2026-04-14T00:00:00Z', '2026-04-14T00:00:00Z');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+
+        conn.execute("REINDEX;").unwrap();
+        conn.close().unwrap();
+
+        let sqlite = rusqlite::Connection::open(&db_path).unwrap();
+        let integrity_check: String = sqlite
+            .query_row("PRAGMA integrity_check;", [], |row| row.get(0))
+            .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(
+            integrity_check, "ok",
+            "autoindex must remain valid after REINDEX"
+        );
+    }
+
     #[test]
     fn test_prepared_statement_inherits_trace_id() {
         let conn = Connection::open(":memory:").unwrap();
